grant_title: MassHire Greater Lowell Awarded $2 Millions Grant to Fund Jobs Training for Youths and Young Adults
geographic_restrictions: Massachusetts, specifically the Greater Lowell region (Lowell, Dracut, Billerica, Tewksbury, Chelmsford, Dunstable, Tyngsborough, Westford)
project_area: Youth employment and job training program focusing on construction, early education, and health/medical sectors
demographic_requirements: Youth and young adults aged 14-25, with a focus on low-income individuals
eligibility_summary: Open to organizations and agencies administering youth employment programs in the Greater Lowell region, with priority given to programs serving low-income youth aged 14-25.
